inputs.label: Total Production (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of finished goods produced in the reporting period (ISO 14051 material flow).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of finished goods produced in the reporting period (ISO 14051 material flow).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Raporlama döneminde üretilen mamullerin toplam ağırlığı (ISO 14051 malzeme akışı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der im Berichtszeitraum produzierten Fertigwaren (ISO 14051 Materialfluss).

inputs.label: Waste (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of food waste generated (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of food waste generated (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oluşan toplam gıda atığı ağırlığı (kırpıntı, bozulma, aşırı üretim ve son kullanma tarihi geçmiş ürün dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der erzeugten Lebensmittelabfälle (einschließlich Verschnitt, Verderb, Überproduktion und abgelaufener Produkte).

inputs.label: Selling Price per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average revenue per kg of finished product sold (net of discounts).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average revenue per kg of finished product sold (net of discounts).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satılan mamulün kg başına ortalama geliri (iskontolar düşülmüş).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Erlös pro kg verkauftem Fertigprodukt (netto nach Rabatten).

inputs.label: Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Total variable cost per kg (raw materials, labor, energy, packaging).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total variable cost per kg (raw materials, labor, energy, packaging).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kg başına toplam değişken maliyet (hammadde, işçilik, enerji, ambalaj).
businessContext_i18n.de: Variable Gesamtkosten pro kg (Rohstoffe, Arbeit, Energie, Verpackung).

inputs.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of waste (landfill, composting, incineration).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to dispose of waste (landfill, composting, incineration).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für die Abfallentsorgung (Deponie, Kompostierung, Verbrennung).

inputs.label: Rework Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect rate).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işleme gerektiren üretim yüzdesi (Yalın Altı Sigma kusur oranı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Produktion, der Nacharbeit erfordert (Lean Six Sigma Fehlerrate).

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average fully loaded labor cost per hour (including benefits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully loaded labor cost per hour (including benefits).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saat başına ortalama tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti (yan haklar dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche voll belastete Arbeitskosten pro Stunde (inkl. Zusatzleistungen).

inputs.label: Rework Hours per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours required to rework one kg of product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average labor hours required to rework one kg of product.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kg ürünü yeniden işlemek için gereken ortalama işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Arbeitsstunden zur Nacharbeit eines kg Produkts.

rules.message: Rework percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Selling price should be greater than or equal to cost per kg for positive margin.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 10% - investigate root cause (Six Sigma DMAIC).
Margin loss exceeds 15% - immediate action required (Lean waste reduction).
Rework percentage above 5% - consider process capability improvement (Cp/Cpk).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
